summary: GCA's current public action plan prioritizes one clean BaseScan owner resubmission, legitimate market quality, member access operations, consistent public content, and optional trust upgrades without artificial activity or unsupported claims.

priorityQueue.title: Submit one clean BaseScan update
priorityQueue.summary: Use the official-domain mailbox, Project Profile BaseScan map, Tim Chen profile, domain email evidence checklist, BaseScan Handoff copy blocks, and Chinese owner flow for one clean BaseScan token-profile resubmission.
boundaries: Do not open duplicate BaseScan token-profile submissions while an existing ticket is pending.
Do not claim BaseScan token-profile approval before BaseScan publishes it.

priorityQueue.title: Improve market quality legitimately
priorityQueue.summary: Keep official market links consistent, educate users, publish organic project updates, and consider deeper transparent liquidity only through owner-approved on-chain actions.
boundaries: Do not use artificial activity, wash trading, or fake volume.
Do not claim deep liquidity while the pool remains starter-depth only.

priorityQueue.title: Make member access operations real
priorityQueue.summary: Public intake, read-only wallet checks, eligible ledger records, support workflow, and service delivery references are live; continue improving review operations and member status visibility.
boundaries: Do not describe credits or member benefits as cash, income, automatic token claims, or trading permission.
The 10,000 GCA member benefit remains manual-review only.

priorityQueue.title: Publish consistent public content
priorityQueue.summary: Maintain the Go China narrative with project updates, risk education, product previews, and member-access explainers without price promises.
boundaries: Do not promise price movement, returns, reimbursement, buybacks, or guaranteed platform outcomes.

priorityQueue.title: Choose trust upgrades only when needed
priorityQueue.summary: Third-party audit, LP lock, Safe multisig, reserve lock, or vesting can improve reviewer confidence but require independent vendors or explicit owner on-chain action.
boundaries: Do not claim an external audit before an independent report is completed and published.
Do not claim reserves or LP are locked, vested, or multisig-controlled before on-chain evidence exists.

safePublicClaims: GCA is a fixed-supply ERC-20 token on Base Mainnet.
BaseScan source verification and deployer-wallet ownership verification are complete.
The public BaseScan token profile update was returned again as information-insufficient on 2026-05-23.
support@gcagochina.com is the official project-domain mailbox for platform communication.
GeckoTerminal token information was approved on 2026-05-11.
The official public market route is the Base Mainnet Uniswap v4 GCA/USDT pool.
No third-party audit has been completed.
doNotClaim: CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap listing before publication
external audit completion before an independent report exists
locked reserves, vested reserves, multisig reserves, or locked LP before on-chain evidence exists
deep liquidity, price support, returns, income, reimbursement, buybacks, or artificial volume
